programs.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programs.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programs.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

programs.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programs.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programs.title: Battlefield Earth
programs.desc: Humanity is enslaved by gold-thirsty tyrants, whose 'man-animals' are about to ignite a rebellion.

programs.title: The 5th Wave
programs.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programs.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programs.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.
